task_description: Create a new assigned-access kiosk user account named TEST and configure it to run the Alarms & Clock app.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed crop shows the Windows taskbar at the bottom-left, with a semitransparent red X centered on the Adobe Acrobat DC taskbar icon, a dark square icon with the white Acrobat ribbon-like symbol. Nearby are the Windows Start button, a yellow File Explorer folder icon, and the Microsoft Edge blue-green wave icon. In the full-screen view, the Windows desktop is visible with several desktop shortcuts on the left and the taskbar along the bottom; the target is a taskbar UI control, not a desktop object.
caption.action: Click the Adobe Acrobat DC icon on the taskbar.
caption.expectation: Adobe Acrobat DC should open or come to the foreground, making its window active.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed view shows the Windows Start/Search panel open in the lower-left of the desktop. The text entry area at the bottom of this panel is active, and the letters "co" are currently visible in the search box, indicating text is being entered into the Windows search field and the next characters will append to the existing text. Above, the results list highlights "控制面板" with its blue control panel icon, and related results appear underneath. In the full-screen view, this search panel overlays the Windows desktop with several icons on the left and the taskbar along the bottom.
caption.action: Type "CON" into the active Windows search box, appending it to the existing text.
caption.expectation: The search text should update to include the newly typed letters, and the Start/Search results should refine around Control Panel-related matches.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the Windows Start/Search panel already open. The search box at the bottom contains the text "CON". In the left results list, "控制面板" with a blue Control Panel icon is highlighted under the best match section, and a vertical scrollbar is visible in that left pane. The right detail pane shows a larger Control Panel icon, the label "控制面板", the category "应用", an "打开" option, and a Recent list of related items. The full-screen image shows this panel over the Windows desktop with application shortcuts on the left and the taskbar along the bottom.
caption.action: Scroll up within the open Windows search results panel to move the results list upward.
caption.expectation: The search results pane should shift upward slightly while keeping the Start/Search panel open, with Control Panel-related results still visible or moving closer to the top.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the Windows search panel's results list, with a semitransparent red X centered on the highlighted result labeled "控制面板" and the smaller category text "应用" beneath it. This is a selectable list item in the results pane, not a blank area. The top tabs such as "应用", "文档", "网页", and "更多" are visible above. In the full-screen view, the Start/Search panel is open over the Windows desktop; the search box at the bottom contains "CON", the left pane has "控制面板" selected as the best match, and the right pane shows the larger Control Panel icon with an "打开" option.
caption.action: Click the highlighted "控制面板" search result in the left results list.
caption.expectation: The selected result should be activated, causing Control Panel to open in a new window or come to the foreground.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the category tile labeled "用户账户" with a small icon of two people and the smaller blue link text "更改账户类型" beneath it. This is a selectable category item in the main Control Panel content area, not a blank region. In the full-screen image, a Control Panel window is open in category view on the Windows desktop, showing several categories such as "系统和安全", "网络和 Internet", "硬件和声音", "程序", "外观和个性化", "时钟和区域", and "轻松使用".
caption.action: Click the "用户账户" category tile in the Control Panel window.
caption.expectation: The Control Panel should open the User Accounts section, replacing the category overview with account-related options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the blue link labeled "删除用户账户" with a small shield icon immediately to its left, inside the highlighted "用户账户" section. This is a clickable UI control in the main content area, not a blank region. In the full-screen image, a Control Panel window titled "用户帐户" is open on the Windows desktop; the main pane shows options including "更改账户类型", "删除用户账户", and links under "凭据管理器", while desktop icons remain visible behind the window.
caption.action: Click the "删除用户账户" link with the shield icon in the User Accounts section.
caption.expectation: The Control Panel should open the delete user account page or a related account management screen for removing an account.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the blue underlined link labeled "在电脑设置中添加新用户". This is a clickable text link in the main content area, not a blank region. In the full-screen image, a Control Panel window titled for managing accounts is open on the Windows desktop. The page says "选择要更改的用户" and shows a single account tile for "Administrator" with a user silhouette icon, while the blue link appears below the account list.
caption.action: Click the blue underlined link "在电脑设置中添加新用户".
caption.expectation: The system should open the Settings interface or a related account-adding page where a new user can be created.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray highlighted row labeled "分配的访问权限" with a small monitor/computer icon on the left and descriptive text underneath beginning with "将此设备设置为展台". This is a clickable settings list item in the main content area, not a blank region. In the full-screen image, the Windows Settings window is open to "其他用户" and the section "设置展台" is visible, with the Control Panel account-management window still open behind it on the desktop.
caption.action: Click the "分配的访问权限" row in the "设置展台" section.
caption.expectation: The Settings app should open the assigned access setup page or related kiosk configuration options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on a gray rectangular button labeled "开始" beneath the kiosk setup instructions. This is a clickable button in the main content area. In the full-screen image, the Windows Settings window is open to "设置展台", with explanatory text about creating or choosing a local account for assigned access, and the Control Panel account management window remains open behind it on the desktop.
caption.expectation: The assigned access setup wizard or account selection flow should open so kiosk configuration can continue.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows a Windows dialog titled "创建帐户" with a labeled text field "添加名称" active and outlined in blue. Inside the field, the text currently reads "TE", indicating text is being entered into the new account name box and appears to be appending toward the intended name. At the bottom of the dialog are two gray buttons: "下一页" and "取消". In the full-screen view, this account-creation dialog is centered over the Settings app, with the Control Panel user accounts window visible behind it on the desktop.
caption.action: Type "TEST" into the "添加名称" field.
caption.expectation: The account name field should contain "TEST", enabling continuation to the next step of account creation.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray button labeled "下一页", indicating the exact click target is this UI control. In the full-screen view, a Windows dialog titled "创建帐户" is open in front of other windows, the "添加名称" text field contains "TEST", and the buttons "下一页" and "取消" are at the bottom of the dialog.
caption.expectation: The account creation dialog should advance to the next step in the setup flow, using the entered account name.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows the full active dialog rather than a tight target, with no semitransparent red X. A Windows Settings modal titled "选择展台应用" is open. It contains a scrollable list of apps with entries such as "Xbox", "Xbox Game Bar", "地图", "电影和电视", "反馈中心", and "画图 3D"; "Xbox" is currently highlighted in light gray. A vertical scrollbar is visible on the right side of the list, indicating more items below. At the bottom are disabled-looking "下一页" and a "取消" button. In the full-screen view, this app-selection dialog is centered over the kiosk setup/settings window, with a Control Panel user accounts window behind it on the desktop.
caption.action: Scroll down in the app list within the "选择展台应用" dialog.
caption.expectation: The list should move downward to reveal more available apps lower in the alphabetical list for kiosk selection.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the app list row labeled "闹钟和时钟" with a blue square icon containing a white alarm clock and the publisher text "Microsoft Corporation" beneath it. This indicates the exact target is that app entry in the selectable list. In the full-screen view, a Windows Settings dialog titled "选择展台应用" is open over Control Panel, showing kiosk-app choices such as "录音机", "闹钟和时钟", "你的手机", "人脉", and "日历"; the "下一页" button at the bottom appears inactive before selection.
caption.action: Click the "闹钟和时钟" app entry in the list.
caption.expectation: That app should become selected in the dialog, and the interface should update to reflect the selection, likely enabling the next step.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The crop shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray button labeled "下一页", so the exact target is this bottom dialog button, which is a UI control. In the full-screen view, a Windows Settings dialog titled "选择展台应用" is open over other windows, with the app "闹钟和时钟" highlighted in blue in the list and the buttons "下一页" and "取消" at the bottom.
caption.expectation: The selected app choice should be accepted and the setup should advance to the next kiosk configuration screen or step.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a semitransparent red X centered on the gray button labeled "关闭", indicating the exact target is that bottom dialog button, a UI control. In the full-screen image, a Windows Settings-style setup window is in front with the heading "完成!" and explanatory text about kiosk mode; at the bottom are the buttons "关闭" and a grayed-out "取消". Behind it is a Control Panel user accounts window on the desktop.
caption.expectation: The completion dialog should close, ending the kiosk setup flow and returning focus to the underlying window or desktop.
